one_time_description: Treaty annuities settlement net of expenses ($6,565,825 settlement less $5,897,887 expenses) in prior year 2019
economic_notes: First Nation is located in Treaty 6 Territory. COVID-19 impacted operations including office closures, travel restrictions, event cancellations. Future funding from First Nations Trust and BATC Community Development Corporation expected to be negatively impacted due to temporary closure of SIGA casinos. Effective April 1, 2020, health services transferred to Battle River Treaty 6 Health Centre Inc. Sweetgrass Developments Limited Partnership and Sweetgrass Investments Ltd. consolidated. 20% interest in BATC Investments Limited Partnership and BATC Land Holdings Inc.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). One-time treaty annuities settlement of $667,938 net occurred in prior year (2019), not current year. Three entities consolidated: Sweetgrass First Nation, Sweetgrass First Nation CMHC Housing, Sweetgrass Developments Limited Partnership, Sweetgrass Investments Ltd. (4 total entities consolidated). COVID-19 noted as significant event. Health segment newly added in 2020 as First Nation administered health services from September 1, 2019 to March 31, 2020 before transferring to Battle River Treaty 6 Health Centre Inc. effective April 1, 2020. Own Source schedule appears truncated in source document. Expenses_housing mapped to Other segment which includes CMHC housing operations. Chief and Council remuneration included in expenses by object at $395,906 total but individual ranges not disclosed in a remuneration schedule.
